text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on the team. Please review the moderator guidelines and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

Welcome, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to having you help organize and run community events. Check out the event calendar and say hi in the introductions channel!
Welcome aboard, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a community member. Feel free to explore the channels, introduce yourself, and get involved. We're glad to have you!

Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a great asset to the community. Please check out the mentorship program details and let us know if you need anything to get started.
